title: TS SSC Result 2026 LIVE Updates: Telangana class 10 results out at 2 pm, direct link here
description: Telangana TS SSC Result 2026 LIVE Updates: The Telangana Class 10 results will be announced today at 2 pm. Students who appeared for the Class 10 board examinations across the state can check their results on the official website of the Board of Secondary Education Telangana at bse.telangana.gov.in.
